QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_13

question.text: In the SEBI vs First Financial Services Limited (FFSL) case, by what percentage did the scrip price rise during the manipulation period May 15, 2012 to February 8, 2013?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Case 8.1, the price of the scrip rose by 4824.3% during the period from May 15, 2012 to February 8, 2013. **The Trap:** Such extreme price rises are a hallmark of manipulated scrips and round numbers may seem more plausible. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Extreme price movements with low volume followed by high-volume selling is a classic pump-and-dump pattern.
